rationale: Section 48.301 concerns additional assistance for districts based on students using public education grants. It does not reference homestead exemptions or Tax Code §11.13(b), so no direct conflict exists.
quote: The amount of additional assistance under this section is computed by subtracting the number of students residing in the district and using public education grants to attend school in another district for the year in which the assistance is granted from the number of students using public education grants to attend school in the district for that year and multiplying the difference by $266.
_note: No reference to homestead exemption or property tax appraisal values in this section.
